name: problem-consciousness-frontier
displayName: 問題意識邏輯 · 前沿分析包 Problem-Consciousness Frontier
description: Domain-analysis pack that sits downstream of the neutral problem-consciousness core: a concrete corpus → geometry → lifecycle → white-space pipeline, distilled from patent-landscape and thermal/materials white-space research. Carries domain-specific machinery (census, CPC/IPC, geometry/manifold/HMM analyses, patent frontier) and references a supporting Python toolchain. Install alongside problem-consciousness.
